title: ammannia diandra
intro: Ammannia diandra, also known as Red button ammannia, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its red or pink flowers and button-like shape. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Ammannia diandra include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an anti-diarrheal agent. Herbal preparations of Ammannia diandra include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
